toasts.fillNameAndId: Fill in name and Client ID
toasts.invalidClientId: Invalid Client ID (must be numeric, 15-30 digits)
toasts.ecoThemeLock: Disable Eco Mode to change the theme!

customCss.title: Custom CSS
customCss.hint: Customize Solari's look with your own CSS or choose a preset.
customCss.enterPresetName: Enter a name for your preset:

extensionTab.title: Browser Extension
extensionTab.statusDisconnected: Not connected. Make sure the Solari extension is installed and your browser is open.
extensionTab.controlsDesc: Adjust how the extension behaves in the browser.
extensionTab.tabModeDesc: Choose how the active tab is selected.
extensionTab.incognitoDesc: Allow media tracking in incognito/private tabs.
extensionTab.activeTabsDesc: Active media tabs identified by the browser extension.
extensionTab.statsDesc: Usage statistics in the current session.
extensionTab.promoTitle: Sync Your Browsing in Real Time
extensionTab.promoDescription: With the official Solari extension, you can automatically sync your Discord Rich Presence with whatever you are watching in the browser!
extensionTab.step1: Install the official Solari extension from the Chrome Web Store.
extensionTab.step2: Keep the extension enabled (it will automatically connect to the Solari App).
extensionTab.step3: Open any video or stream on YouTube, Netflix, Twitch, or Prime Video.
extensionTab.step4: Your Discord status will be updated in real time!
extensionTab.mappingsDesc: Configure the preset and Client ID for each platform.
extensionTab.invalidActivityDesc: For the platform {platform}, the preset must be configured as '{expected}'.

settings.updatesDesc: Manage automatic updates and view Changelogs.
settings.startWithWindowsDesc: Starts Solari automatically when the PC turns on.
settings.startMinimizedDesc: Starts directly in the System Tray without showing the window.
settings.minimizeToTrayDesc: Closing the window keeps Solari open in the tray.
settings.showEcoModeDesc: Displays the Eco Mode bar at the top of Solari.
settings.privacyDesc: Manage how Solari collects data for improvement.
settings.additionalTelemetryDesc: Collects greater usage information regarding the Solari ecosystem to help us optimize the application.

pluginStore.title: Official Plugins
pluginStore.subtitle: Free plugins to extend Solari with BetterDiscord
pluginStore.fetchError: Error loading plugins. Check your connection.
pluginStore.activateNotice: Activate the plugin in BetterDiscord settings!
pluginStore.bdNotInstalledInstallNotice: Plugin installed! However, BetterDiscord is not installed. You need to install BetterDiscord for the plugin to work, and enable it in the BetterDiscord settings panel.
pluginStore.bdDirNotFoundTooltip: BetterDiscord plugins folder not found. Install BetterDiscord first.
pluginStore.bdWarningDesc: To use Solari plugins, you need BetterDiscord installed on Discord.
pluginStore.bdBrokenDesc: A Discord update removed the BetterDiscord injection. Reinstall to restore plugins.
pluginStore.bdPendingDesc: Discord has downloaded an update but hasn't restarted yet. Auto-Repair has been paused to prevent loops.
pluginStore.bdDisclaimerText: Solari is an independent project. We are NOT the creators of BetterDiscord and have no official affiliation with the BetterDiscord team. BetterDiscord is an open-source project by its own community.
pluginStore.confirmDelete:
Do you want to uninstall {name}?
The file will be removed from the BetterDiscord plugins folder.
pluginStore.allUpToDate: All plugins are already up to date!
pluginStore.bdOutdatedDesc: A new BD version is available. Updating may fix incompatibilities with the current Discord.
pluginStore.bdManagerCoreDesc: Allows the Solari App to confirm BD is running and remotely manage plugins.
pluginStore.bdManagerNoPlugin: Install and enable SolariManager in BetterDiscord to see your plugins here.
pluginStore.bdIncompatibleDesc: A Discord update broke compatibility. Wait for an official fix to restore your plugins.
pluginStore.bdManagerStep2: In the sidebar, scroll down to BetterDiscord and click Plugins.
pluginStore.bdManagerStep4: Click the toggle switch to enable the plugin.

smartafk.title: SmartAFK Detector
smartafk.description: Automatically detects inactivity and updates your Discord status. Syncs with Solari via WebSocket.
features: Sync with Solari app via WebSocket

spotifysync.title: SpotifySync
spotifysync.description: Sync Spotify with Discord and control playback directly from Discord.

solarinotes.title: Solari Notes
solarinotes.description: Sleek, synchronized notepad integrated strictly into Discord's UI. Saves securely to your local PC via the Solari App.

solarimessagetools.title: Solari MessageTools
solarimessagetools.description: Unlock advanced powers: Quick Edit, Anti-Typing incognito, instant translation, and macro shortcuts.
solarimessagetools.quickEditDesc: Double-click to edit, Shift+Click to instantly delete messages.
solarimessagetools.antiTypingDesc: Secretly type without triggering the 'is typing...' indicator.
solarimessagetools.editRevealerDesc: Show the original text of edited messages locally.
solarimessagetools.activeTranslationDesc: Right click context menu translations and Input formatting.
solarimessagetools.languageDesc: Choose your primary translation output language.

prompt.clientIdDesc: Input your custom application Client ID:

presence.title: Presence Configuration
presence.largeImageLinkPlaceholder: Link when clicking Large Image (ex: https://...)
presence.tipLargeImageLink: Makes Large Image clickable. Must start with https://.
presence.smallImageHint: Image that appears in the bottom right corner
presence.smallImageLinkPlaceholder: Link when clicking Small Image (ex: https://...)
presence.tipSmallImageLink: Makes Small Image clickable. Must start with https://.
presence.timestampEndHint: Shows how much time is left instead of elapsed
presence.largeImagePlaceholder: Paste image URL or Discord asset key
presence.largeImageHint: Use a Discord Developer asset or external URL (Imgur recommended)
presence.largeImageWarning: External URLs may not work with all Discord clients
presence.queuedNoConnection: Status queued, but Discord is disconnected!
presence.rpcDisabled: Rich Presence is disabled in settings!
presence.tipActivityType: Defines the verb shown on Discord: Playing, Listening, Watching or Competing. Only changes the label — not the RPC connection.
presence.tipDetails: Main line of Rich Presence, shown right below the app name. Max 128 characters. Supports a clickable link if the URL field is filled.
presence.tipDetailsUrl: Makes Line 1 clickable when users click on it. Must start with https://.
presence.tipState: Second line, usually for sub-context like 'In ranked match'. Max 128 characters.
presence.tipStateUrl: Makes Line 2 clickable when users click on it. Must start with https://.
presence.tipLargeImage: 512×512px image that fills the card. Use Imgur or a direct URL. Discord may take up to 1 minute to cache a new image.
presence.tipLargeImageText: Tooltip shown when hovering the large image in Discord.
presence.tipSmallImage: 128×128px icon at the bottom-right of the large image. Only visible if a Large Image is also set.
presence.tipSmallImageText: Tooltip shown when hovering the small image in Discord.
presence.tipParty: Shows 'X of Y' in Discord (e.g. '3 of 5 players'). Only appears if both fields are filled. Current must not exceed Max.
presence.tipButtons: Up to 2 clickable buttons on your card. Label: max 32 chars, URL must start with https://. Note: you won't see your own buttons — other Discord users will.
presence.tipTimestamp: Controls the timer shown in your Rich Presence. 'Normal' counts up from when you clicked Update Status. 'Local' shows your current clock time. 'Custom' lets you pick a specific date and time.
presence.tipTimestampEnd: When enabled, Discord shows a countdown ('ends in X min') instead of an elapsed timer ('X min elapsed'). Requires setting an end timestamp in Custom mode.

onboarding.title: First Step: Configure your Client ID
onboarding.desc: Solari needs a Discord Application ID to show your Rich Presence. It's free and takes 2 minutes.

contextBar.editEntersManual: Click 'Update Status' to enter manual mode.
contextBar.autoDetectIdle: Auto-Detect active — no app detected. Fill the form to set manually.
contextBar.fillFormManual: Fill the form to set the presence manually.
contextBar.manualMode: Manual Mode — what you fill here will be shown on Discord when you click Update Status.

presets.title: Presets
presets.infoTooltip: Save different Rich Presence configurations as Presets to quickly switch between them.
presets.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?

identities.title: App Profiles
identities.infoTooltip: Use App Profiles to switch the application name displayed in your Discord status (e.g., 'Playing Visual Studio' instead of just 'Solari').
identities.hint: Create multiple profiles with different Discord Client IDs.
identities.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
identities.fillNameAndId: Fill in the name and Client ID
identities.invalidClientId: Invalid Client ID (must be numeric, 15-30 digits)

soundboard.driverDescription: To use SoundBoard on Discord, you need to install VB-Audio Virtual Cable (free).
soundboard.driverStep1: Click the button below to download VB-Cable
soundboard.driverStep4: Come back here and click "Check Driver"
soundboard.discordReminder: Remember: In Discord, select "CABLE Output" as input device!
soundboard.discordStep3: Done! Solari sounds will go to your call
soundboard.dragFiles: Drag files here or click to browse

spotify.showAlwaysWhenOpenWarning: 1 hour limit without playing music (Discord limit)

solariPlugin.title: Solari Plugin
solariPlugin.renameHint: Double click or Right-click to rename

smartAfk.title: Smart AFK
smartAfk.afkLevelsHint: Trigger different statuses based on inactivity time.
smartAfk.disablePresetsHint: If one of these presets is active, AFK will not trigger.

autoDetect.title: Auto-Detection
autoDetect.subtitle: Configure presets to be activated automatically
autoDetect.fallbackHint: When no mapped program is detected:
autoDetect.taskManagerHint: Tip: Use Task Manager (Ctrl+Shift+Esc) to see the process name
autoDetect.websiteDetectionHint: Detects keywords in browser window title (Brave, Chrome, Edge, etc.)
autoDetect.websiteHint: When you open Netflix in browser, the title will be "Netflix - Brave" and it will be detected!
autoDetect.detectionMethodHint: Choose how to detect sites like YouTube, Netflix and Twitch:
autoDetect.useExtensionHint: Automatically detects what you are watching in the browser.
autoDetect.useAutoDetectHint: Detects by keyword in window title.
autoDetect.extensionModeDescription: The Solari extension will automatically detect what you are watching on YouTube, Netflix and Twitch.
autoDetect.extensionDisabledNotice: Auto-Detect for sites is disabled while extension mode is active.
autoDetect.extensionNotInstalled: If the extension is not installed,
autoDetect.alertSelectPreset: Please select a preset and enter a process/keyword.
autoDetect.alertExists: A mapping for this process/keyword already exists!

menu.aboutDetail:
Developed by TheDroid.
A premium RPC client for Discord.
menu.updateMessage: A new version of Solari is available.
menu.noUpdates: You are using the latest version!
menu.clientIdStep2: 2. Create a new application and copy the Application ID
menu.clientIdInvalid: Please enter a valid Client ID!

wizard.subtitle: Your ultimate Discord Rich Presence companion.
wizard.styleSubtitle: Select a theme that fits your vibe.
wizard.autoDetectDesc: Monitors active system processes (`tasklist`) and open browser window titles natively. No memory reading, DLL hooks, or game file injection.
wizard.profilesDesc: Establishes a local IPC socket connection to the running Discord client. Swaps active RPC sessions in real-time using each preset's respective Application Client ID.
wizard.clientIdSubtitle: The Client ID is the unique identifier that determines which "game" name will be shown in your Discord status.
wizard.clientIdHint: Solari requires at least 1 default Client ID as a fallback. Choose a public option below or configure a custom ID.
wizard.getPortalLink: Create Application in Discord Developer Portal
wizard.dragTip: 💡 Drag the assistant by its edges to view the main app window below!
wizard.pluginsSubtitle: Manage integrated plugins and BetterDiscord to get automated features.
wizard.bdRequiredDesc: BetterDiscord is a client modification required to load client-side integrations (Spotify Sync, Solari Motion...) into Discord.
wizard.bdInstStep1: Open Discord Settings (click the gear icon ⚙️).
wizard.bdInstStep2: On the left sidebar, click the Plugins tab under BetterDiscord.
wizard.bdInstStep3: Toggle the switch next to each desired plugin to activate it.
wizard.bdInstNote: ⚠️ Note: This manual step is not required if the Solari Manager plugin is installed and enabled in BetterDiscord, as it automatically manages all other plugins!
wizard.pluginEnabled: Plugin enabled and ready in BetterDiscord!
wizard.pluginDisabled: Plugin uninstalled and removed from BetterDiscord!
wizard.pluginError: An error occurred while managing the plugin in BetterDiscord.
wizard.pluginSolariManagerDesc: Core connector. Confirms BetterDiscord is alive and syncs settings.
wizard.pluginSolariMotionDesc: The most advanced animation system for Discord.
wizard.pluginSpotifySyncDesc: Show what you're listening to with album art.
wizard.pluginSolariMessageToolsDesc: Macros, quick edit/delete, anti-typing, and translation.
wizard.pluginSolariPlayerDesc: Premium video player with Picture-in-Picture and theater mode.
wizard.extensionSubtitle: Sync your browser activities with Solari in real-time.
wizard.extFeatureVideoDesc: Show what you watch on YouTube, Netflix, Twitch, and Prime Video on your Discord profile in real-time.
wizard.extFeatureWorkDesc: Communicates locally with the Solari App. No external servers and completely private.
wizard.extFeaturePrivacyDesc: Enable or disable tracking on any platform individually at any time via the extension menu.
wizard.extDownloadDesc: Compatible with Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, Opera, Brave, and Firefox.
wizard.pluginSmartAfkDesc: Automatically set status when you're away.
wizard.pluginSpotifyDesc: Show what you're listening to with album art.
wizard.pluginAutoDetectDesc: Automatically detect games and apps to update your status.
wizard.behaviorSubtitle: Configure how Solari behaves on your system.
wizard.startWithWindowsDesc: Launch Solari automatically when your PC boots.
wizard.startMinimizedDesc: Open in the system tray instead of showing the window.
wizard.minimizeToTrayDesc: Closing the window keeps Solari running in the tray.
wizard.autoUpdatesDesc: Automatically check for new Solari versions on startup.
wizard.soundBoardDesc: Routes audio output through a virtual cable driver (like VB-Cable) mapped as your microphone input in Discord. Does not modify or hack the Discord client.

hwMonitor.title: Hardware Monitor
hwMonitor.description: Display CPU, RAM and GPU in real-time in your Rich Presence.

publicPresets.subtitle: Find complete pre-configured presets and ready-to-use Client IDs for your Rich Presence.
publicPresets.errorDesc: Check your Internet connection and try again.
publicPresets.savedLocalToast: Preset '{name}' saved locally and linked to profile!
publicPresets.conflictDesc: A local preset with this same Client ID ({clientId}) already exists. What would you like to do?

extensionAd.title: Automatic Synchronization Available!
extensionAd.desc: This preset is static. Install our official Solari Browser Extension to automatically sync your videos and streams in real time!
extensionAd.toastInfo: Install the extension to sync videos and streams automatically!

themeMenu.title: Style & Customization
themeMenu.galleryDesc: Choose an exclusive style to fully redefine Solari's look and atmosphere.
themeMenu.defaultDesc: The original Solari look with orange accents.
themeMenu.darkDesc: Futuristic dark theme in glacial ice blue.
themeMenu.lightDesc: Clean, minimalist and comfortable light interface.
themeMenu.retroDesc: 80s amber phosphor terminal with CRT scanlines and sharp corners.
themeMenu.sakuraDesc: Sweet pastel pink light theme with ultra-rounded corners.
themeMenu.brutalistDesc: High contrast yellow & black neo-brutalist styling with sharp corners and solid offset shadows.
themeMenu.aeroDesc: 2000s glossy glassmorphism, realistic reflections, and sky blue accents.
themeMenu.eInkDesc: Monochrome e-paper reader theme with Georgia serif typography and high legibility.
themeMenu.cyberNoirDesc: Tactical black & neon red sci-fi look with a military radar grid background.
themeMenu.polaroidDesc: Warm cream/beige nostalgia paper look with a vintage color-stripe decal.
themeMenu.auroraDesc: Deep arctic navy sky look with luminous emerald & cyan aurora gradients.

feedbackModal.title: Feedback & Suggestions
feedbackModal.chooseDesc: Your opinion is essential for us to improve Solari! Choose the best format to send your message:
feedbackModal.chooseFeedbackDesc: Rate your experience and give us a score from 1 to 5 stars.
feedbackModal.chooseSuggestionDesc: Have an idea? Suggest new features and improvements for the app.
feedbackModal.suggestionMessagePlaceholder: Explain how this improvement would work and why it would be useful...
feedbackModal.cooldownMessage: Please wait {minutes} min before submitting new forms.
feedbackModal.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields!
feedbackModal.serverCooldown: Submission limit reached for your IP. Please try again later.
